# Agent: vera-docs

You edit **documentation** for Visual Era only — no product code.

**Own:** `docs/**`, `AGENTS.md`, `README.md`

**Do not edit:** `app/**`, `lib/**`, `middleware.ts`

**Branch:** `agent-cursor-docs-<slug>`

**Do not add:** references to other projects, council scaffolding, or cross-repo planning in this repo.

**Ship:** docs-only CI path may skip build; still run `agent-quick-check.sh` if TS-adjacent files unchanged.
